conn.title: No connection to the app
conn.subtitle: Phorm Studio can't reach the phorm_devtools bridge. Make sure the app calls enablePhormDevtools(db) and runs in debug mode.

inspector.liveDesc: Rows and counters update in real time on any data change in the app — no manual reload.
inspector.selectTableSub: The list of your database tables is on the left.
inspector.emptyTableSub: Click “Add row” to create the first record.
inspector.importHint: Paste a JSON array of rows

editor.notNull: NOT NULL without default — fill this in
editor.notNullNull: Column is NOT NULL — NULL not allowed

queries.emptySub: Run queries in the app — they'll show up here in real time, with duration and status.
queries.explainDesc: Shows how SQLite runs the query: via an index or a full table scan. Full scans are highlighted — a precise hint of where an index is needed.

profiler.p50hint: Median: half of the queries are faster than this.
profiler.p95hint: 95% of queries are faster than this — shows worst-case behavior.
profiler.nplusoneDesc: Looks like N+1: consider include / JOIN to fetch related data in one query.
profiler.emptySub: Run queries in the app — session stats, N+1 detection and query plans will appear here.

migrations.emptySub: History from the __phorm_migrations table will appear here after the first migration runs.

streams.emptySub: Active watchOne / watchAll subscriptions with their dependencies and emit counts will appear here.
streams.headerDesc: Every watchOne/watchAll subscription in your app, live — which tables it depends on, how many times it re-emitted, and how long it has been alive. Spot leaks and needless rebuilds.

license.hint: Activate a key to unlock Pro: profiler with EXPLAIN, export and import, DB dump, Live mode and reactivity monitoring.
license.malformed: This doesn't look like a Phorm Studio key.

pro.title: Phorm Studio Pro
pro.haveKey: Already have a key? Activate it on the License tab.
pro.proDesc: The full toolkit for working with your database: profiler, export/import, Live mode, reactivity monitoring.
pro.reactivityDesc: Monitor of active watchOne/watchAll streams: dependencies, emit counts, leak detection.
